content: Run project commands as direnv exec . <command>. This loads .envrc first, including root/local env files and the stacked Flox environment, so builds, deploys, QA commands, and CLIs see the same environment the repo expects. Avoid plain flox activate for repo tasks unless intentionally bypassing direnv-loaded env vars.
Use dx <command> as the short repo wrapper for direnv exec . inside the Flox environment; examples: dx bun run check, dx sd ready, dx wrangler pages deployment list --project-name senshac.

title: Use fx for Flox command suite
rationale: Reserve dx as the small direnv-exec wrapper and use fx as the expandable project command surface for Flox-backed workflows such as run/check/build/deploy/ready/smoke. This keeps direct execution and higher-level project automation separate while staying short enough for daily use.
